CustomField.formula:
IF(OR(TEXT(NATT_BluEdge_Price_Type__c)="Extended Basic",TEXT(NATT_BluEdge_Price_Type__c)="Optional Coverage"), TEXT(NATT_BluEdge_Price_Type__c) & " " & TEXT( NATT_Months__c )&" Months / " & TEXT(NATT_Hours__c)& " Hours",
IF(TEXT(NATT_BluEdge_Price_Type__c)="Major Component", TEXT(NATT_BluEdge_Price_Type__c) & " " & TEXT( NATT_Months__c )&" Months / " & TEXT(NATT_Hours__c)& " Hours / " & TEXT(NATT_Deductible__c)&" Deductible",
"N/A"))
CustomField.label: Months/Hours
